title: Bank OZK Announces Increase to Quarterly Common Stock Dividend and Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
author: Na
description: Bank OZK announced an increase to its quarterly common stock dividend from $0.46 to $0.47 per share, representing a 2.17% increase. The bank also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28906 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock. Bank OZK has increased its common stock dividend for 63 consecutive quarters and remains part of the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The bank demonstrated financial strength and shareholder commitment by increasing its quarterly common stock dividend for the 63rd consecutive quarter. Inclusion in the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index and consistent dividend growth over 15+ years indicates stable profitability and management confidence in future earnings.

title: Bank OZK Announces Increase to Quarterly Common Stock Dividend and Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Bank OZK announced an increase to its quarterly common stock dividend from $0.45 to $0.46 per share, representing a 2.22% increase. The bank also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28906 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock. Bank OZK has consistently increased its common stock dividend for 62 consecutive quarters and maintains membership in the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a dividend increase for the 62nd consecutive quarter, demonstrating consistent shareholder value creation and financial strength. The increase, combined with membership in the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index, signals strong operational performance and management confidence in future earnings.

title: Bank OZK Announces Increase to Quarterly Common Stock Dividend and Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Bank OZK has increased its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.45 per share, marking the 61st consecutive quarter of dividend increases. The bank also declared a preferred stock dividend of $0.28906 per share, payable in November 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Consistent dividend increases for 61 consecutive quarters, inclusion in S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index, and strong financial performance with $41.5 billion in total assets demonstrate financial stability and investor confidence

title: Bank OZK Announces Increase to Quarterly Common Stock Dividend and Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Bank OZK increased its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.44 per share, marking the 60th consecutive quarter of dividend increases. The bank also declared a preferred stock dividend of $0.28906 per share, payable in August 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Demonstrated consistent dividend growth for 60 consecutive quarters, indicating financial stability and commitment to shareholder value

title: Bank OZK Announces Increase to Quarterly Common Stock Dividend and Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Bank OZK announced an increase in its quarterly common stock dividend and declared a quarterly cash dividend on its preferred stock.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced an increase in its quarterly common stock dividend, which is a positive sign for investors. Additionally, the company has a consistent track record of increasing its common stock dividend, which has led to its inclusion in the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats® index.
